title: Meal Log
description: Append-only record of every food item consumed per meal per day. Each row = one food item in one meal on one date. Nutrition values consumed are NOT stored here — they are computed at query time by joining to food_library and applying: nutrient_consumed = grams * (nutrient_per_serving / grams_per_serving).

log_id.description: Stable primary key for this log entry. UUID v4. Never reused or reassigned.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who logged this entry. Use 'default' for single-user deployments. FK to users table (future). Required now to support multi-user without a schema migration later.

log_date.description: Date the food was consumed. ISO 8601 date format YYYY-MM-DD. Not a datetime — meal times are not tracked at this time.

meal_type.description: Meal category. Matches the four categories defined in the original workbook. Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner are included in calorie goal splits. Snack is tracked but excluded from the per-meal goal calculation.

food_id.description: Foreign key referencing food_library.food_id. Must match an existing food_id at the time of logging. Immutable after insert.

food_name_snapshot.description: Denormalized copy of food_library.food_name at the time of logging. Preserved so historical log entries remain readable even if the food_library record is renamed or deleted. Do not update this field after insert.

grams.description: Weight in grams of the food item consumed in this log entry. This is the only user-entered numeric value. All nutrition totals are derived from this value at query time.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this log entry was created. Immutable after insert. Used for audit trail and future intra-day ordering if meal times are added.
